/CBD Origins
payload.location: Ciudad de México, Ciudad de México, Mexico
payload.companyDescription:
Bienvenido al mejor recurso para todas tus necesidades inmobiliarias de lujo en el hermoso México! 

Ya sea que estés buscando tu exclusivo hogar ideal o desees vender una propiedad de lujo, nuestro sitio web ofrece una gama completa de servicios diseñados para satisfacer los más altos estándares de calidad.

Te invitamos a disfrutar de tu visita y explorar todo lo que nuestra plataforma inmobiliaria tiene para ofrecer, desde magníficos listados del área hasta valiosos consejos para compradores y vendedores de propiedades de lujo.

Privé Real Estate es una agencia integral de bienes raíces residenciales y comerciales de lujo, con oficinas estratégicamente ubicadas en Santa Fe y Ciudad de México. Nuestro equipo de ventas está compuesto por agentes certificados, expertos en el mercado de lujo, listos para atender tus necesidades de ventas, alquiler y administración de propiedades de alto nivel.

Esperamos ansiosos la oportunidad de servirte y convertirnos en tus socios inmobiliarios de confianza para toda la vida.

Nos enorgullece ser reconocidos como ganadores del premio a la Mejor Agencia de Bienes Raíces de Lujo.

¡Gracias por considerar Privé Real Estate para tus necesidades inmobiliarias de lujo!

payload.summary: Profesional con 25 años de experiencia en el ramo inmobiliario y de construcción.
payload.headline: Chief Executive Officer Mexico, en Abilia Inmobiliaria
payload.location: Magdalena Contreras, Ciudad de México, Mexico
payload.companyDescription:
Somos uno de los desarrolladores inmobiliarios más grandes, experimentados y confiables de México. Nuestra historia comienza en 1991 y desde entonces hemos desarrollado proyectos de gran escala en los segmentos residencial, corporativo, viviendas en renta, comercial y usos mixtos, sumando más de 3 millones de metros cuadrados construidos en las principales ciudades de México.

Abilia es una empresa más de Tresalia Capital, fusionando capacidad de ejecución y solidez financiera. Gracias a esto hemos generado valor sin igual, como contar con historial récord de cumplimiento en entrega del 100% de nuestros proyectos desarrollados, convirtiéndonos así en una de las empresas de mayor credibilidad frente a inversionistas, instituciones financieras y clientes.

Somos un equipo de más de 200 expertos, todos con amplia experiencia en todas las etapas del desarrollo inmobiliario consolidandonos como líderes en el mercado.

Nos caracterizamos por hacer historia desarrollando los proyectos más icónicos de los últimos años. Ejemplos de esto: Terret Polanco, Prado Sur 250, Parques Polanco, el primer proyecto de usos mixtos de la Ciudad de México y el destacado desarrollo Rubén Darío 225. Hoy nos encontramos en un profundo proceso de evolución a través de nuestra expansión internacional, lo cual nos permitirá desarrollar, con nuestra experiencia y conocimiento, proyectos de gran envergadura, ahora también en un nivel global. 

Es así como transformamos positivamente el entorno donde desarrollamos nuestros proyectos, actuando con profundo respeto por el medio ambiente, elevando la calidad de vida de nuestros clientes y logrando la mayor rentabilidad posible para nuestros inversionistas.

payload.summary:
Before you make any SITE SELECTION decisions, consult with us.  Our expertise will help you make informed site selection decisions, avoid costly mistakes, and achieve your goals. 
FDI Advisor.

Luis Miranda
Luis@DiscoveryCRE.com
https://mexicocre.com/
https://discoverycre.com/

USA and Canada Toll free number  1 (800) 603-3460
Mexico Toll Free number 800 099 1437
Guadalajara Telephone number +52 33 3348 2317

Luis is a notable professional in the field of TENAT REPRESENTATION, LOCATION STRATEGY, particularly within the context of nearshoring and industrial real estate in Mexico. His expertise lies in helping companies navigate the complexities of establishing and expanding their operations in the country.

Key Aspects of His Tenant Representation Experience
Comprehensive Support: Luis focuses on assisting companies in launching, operating, and growing their businesses in Mexico. His approach is tailored to meet the specific needs of various industries, ensuring that clients receive effective and efficient representation throughout the process.

Expertise in NEARSHORING TO MEXICO: He emphasizes the importance of nearshoring, which involves relocating operations closer to the North American market. This strategic move is increasingly relevant as companies seek to mitigate risks associated with global supply chains.

Market Knowledge: With extensive experience working along the US-Mexico border and in key cities across Mexico, Miranda possesses a deep understanding of the local real estate landscape. This knowledge enables him to provide valuable insights and recommendations to clients regarding site selection, lease negotiations, and market conditions.

Building Synergies: Miranda is recognized for his ability to foster synergies among various stakeholders in the industrial ecosystem. His collaborative approach helps clients connect with local resources, government entities, and other businesses, enhancing their chances of success in the Mexican market.

Client-Centric Focus: His commitment to understanding and addressing the unique requirements of each client sets him apart in the tenant representation space. By prioritizing client needs, Miranda ensures that companies can thrive in their new environments.

Overall, Luis Miranda's experience in tenant representation at MexicoCRE positions him as a key player in facilitating nearshoring initiatives and supporting businesses in their expansion efforts in Mexico. His insights and expertise are invaluable for companies looking to capitalize on the opportunities presented by the growing trend of nearshoring.

Your Gateway to Mexico Industrial Real Estate.
“Empowering Global Expansion in Mexico.”
“Mapping the Future of Nearshoring Real Estate.”

Leading digital marketplace for industrial and commercial real estate in Mexico, connecting investors, developers, and companies with verified listings, sites, properties, brokers, and industrial parks across the country.

Our ecosystem, delivers executive insights, data, and trend analysis on the nearshoring-driven transformation of Mexico’s real estate and manufacturing landscape.

We empower decision-makers to understand market dynamics, identify strategic locations, and execute successful expansion and investment strategies in Mexico.

Leading source for insights & opportunities at the intersection of nearshoring and commercial real estate throughout Mexico. We track foreign direct investment, industrial development, site selection, and market trends that are reshaping manufacturing and logistics in the region.

Ideal for investors, developers, and decision-makers seeking to understand how nearshoring is transforming Mexico’s industrial and logistics landscape.

Provides in-depth intelligence on Mexico’s industrial corridors, FDI inflows, and site-selection trends. Through data, analysis, and curated updates, we connect global investors and local developers driving the nearshoring revolution.

A data-driven platform designed to empower real estate professionals and global manufacturers expanding in Mexico.

Helps companies, brokers, and investors navigate Mexico’s growing nearshoring opportunities. From site selection to project execution, we link decision-makers with trusted partners.

Market intelligence hub & business connection platform for global companies entering Mexico.

payload.summary:
As a former CMO, legal advisor, and marketing strategist for world-class brands and emerging ventures, I now lead Shoreline Realty Group PV—one of Puerto Vallarta’s most dynamic, tech-forward real estate and property management firms. With over 25 years of experience in real estate, hospitality, and brand-driven growth, I bring a rare mix of digital fluency, legal depth, and operational discipline to every project.

My background spans commercial property management, resort redevelopment, and marketing leadership for companies across the U.S. and Mexico. I’m AMPI-certified, a member of NAR, and deeply connected across the cross-border investment and brokerage community.

Whether it’s real estate, brand strategy, or portfolio growth, my focus is on building value through clarity, performance, and innovation.

payload.location: Puerto Vallarta, Jalisco, Mexico
payload.companyDescription: Shoreline Realty Group PV is a tech forward, cloud based brokerage serving residential buyers, investors, and commercial operators across Puerto Vallarta and Riviera Nayarit. We help clients find safe haven homes, income producing assets, and high potential commercial properties with a focus on security, belonging, and long term value. Our high tech and personal touch approach powers every part of Shoreline, from boutique residential services to an expanding commercial division and a full property management platform. We lead with integrity, prioritize diversity and inclusion, and use data driven strategy to guide smarter decisions. Real estate in Vallarta is about building stability, opportunity, and a future you can trust.

Soy un emprendedor mexicano con más de 10 años de experiencia en el sector financiero e inmobiliario, impulsor de una oferta sencilla, transparente y 100% digital para la compra y venta de casas de interés social. 

Como inspiración, luego de un viaje en el 2014 por diferentes estados de México, tuve la oportunidad de visitar diversas comunidades marginadas del sistema inmobiliario tradicional, decidiendo así apostar all-in por el sector Proptech con mi primera startup Compramos tu casa mx, buscando liderar la transformación digital del sector desde 2017.

Mi principal objetivo es impulsar un mercado confiable y simplificado ofreciendo a cualquier mexicano una forma segura y sencilla de comprar y vender una casa.

payload.companyDescription:
Hauzio (hauzio.com | @gohauzio) es una proptech mexicana que brinda servicios tecnológicos de property management que se enfocan en maximizar y optimizar el ingreso y ocupación de inmuebles de renta de corto plazo. 

Hauzio propulsa los ingresos de propietarios e inversionistas de inmuebles y de hoteles boutique brindando la oportunidad de tener herramientas tecnológicas  (precios dinámicos,  canales directos, publicación en Airbnb Booking y otras plataformas de rentas de corto plazo,  manejo de limpiezas y mantenimientos, marketing digital, alta hospitalidad etc.. ) que permiten un aumento sustancial en la ocupación y retornos de inversión de las propiedades.

Hauzio hace posible que pequeños propietarios e inversionistas tengan acceso a servicios, herramientas y property management que solo estaban reservados a grandes cadenas hoteleras.

hola@hauzio.com

job_title: FOUNDER , THE WALLENDORF COLLECTION, FINE PROPERTIES

payload.jobTitle: FOUNDER , THE WALLENDORF COLLECTION, FINE PROPERTIES
payload.summary:
Deborah Wallendorf is regarded in Baja as an ethical,knowledgable and well connected real estate professional specialising in luxury residential(resale and development) and five star boutique hotels in the affluent markets of Los Cabos and emerging markets on the East Cape and Todos Santos. Deborah has a proven track record in handling complex transactions on the both buyer and seller side. With deep market intel and extensive real estate marketing and contacts worldwide, Deborah has been in Baja since 2002.

Ms. Wallendorf is widely regarded as a specialist advisor to investors, developers and operators in the residential and hospitality industry across the globe, from early stage site selection, master planning and feasibility studies, to operator/management selection, funding advice, asset management and transaction services.

Prior to real estate, Deborah Wallendorf spent 30 years plus in the performance improvement/incentive travel space with impressive current worldwide knowledge and contacts in the luxury 5 star hospitality space. She is known for superlative insights into industry trends ensuring best practices in design, technologies, site selection and investor relations.

Deborah is a consummate sales professional with extensive experience selling in the C-level suite. Her career has encompassed collaborating with multiple business sectors designing and executing strategies to increase employee and customer engagement/motivation through the use of exceptionally designed and impeccably executed events/ incentive programs.

Deborah has traveled consistently to over 120 countries and 1000 cities in the luxury hospitality market.

Somos un consorcio inmobiliario, legal y financiero con más de diez años de experiencia. Nuestra empresa fundadora, Innovare Trading Company, se destacó en el mercado por su innovación, dinamismo y excelencia en la compra, venta, administración y reacondicionamiento de propiedades. Esta base sólida nos permitió expandirnos en inversiones de recuperación y regularización de propiedades, incorporando prestigiosos despachos de abogados y formando Altalta Bienes Raíces.

El éxito en inversiones nos llevó a aliar con CH Capital, sofom y desarrolladora, lo que impulsó el crecimiento en proyectos financieros y de construcción, dando origen a Altaltium Real Estate Solutions. Nuestra misión hoy es facilitar el acceso a inversiones inmobiliarias a la población en general, incrementando el patrimonio de nuestros clientes de forma sustentable y segura.

payload.summary:
Mr Ordorica is a strong strategic thinker, with more than 30 years of hands-on experience in real estate finance, investments and investment management. He is a world-class risk manager and executive - highly regarded for his judgment and integrity.

Currently, Mr Ordorica is President of MEXROB Capital and Chief Executive Officer of ALIGNMEX Real Estate Capital. MEXROB Capital is a private investment firm focused solely on real estate. ALIGNMEX provides real estate investment and asset management services in Mexico. Under Mr Ordorica's leadership, ALIGNMEX offers an integrated and forward looking solution to local and foreign institutional real estate investors interested in capitalizing on the opportunities offered by the Mexican real estate market. In ALIGNMEX, clients benefit from having an experienced local firm with a global mindset that is dynamically managed to reflect the realities of changing market conditions. Moreover, ALIGNMEX stands for “alignment”, a principle that is deeply rooted in the foundation of the Company.

Prior to establishing MEXROB Capital and co-founding ALIGNMEX, Mr Ordorica was the CEO of PREI Latin America, the Latin America real estate investment and advisory business of Prudential Financial, which under his leadership sponsored 8 funds, had an active presence in Mexico, Brazil, Chile, Argentina and Peru and invested more than US$8 billion in Latin America, between 2001 and 2012. Before joining PREI Latin America, Mr Ordorica was the Senior Latin America Advisor and Head of the Latin America team in the Global Real Estate Investment Banking Group at JPMorgan.

Mr Ordorica's professional and academic achievements have been recognized by his appointed membership to the Mexican Society for Geography and Statistics. In 2006, Real Estate Forum also named Mr Ordorica among the next generation of leaders in the global real estate industry, focusing on real estate professionals under 40.

payload.location: Ciudad de México, Ciudad de México, Mexico
payload.companyDescription:
Mica simplifies renting by equipping tenants with financial tools to pay bills and underwrite their risk.


In more detail, with Mica tenants can:
- Rent the apartment they desire (and guarantee the rent payment to the landlord)
- Have their bill payments automated (rent, maintenance, electricity, water, etc.)
- Have financial flexibility, reduced move-in costs, and access to an emergency credit (BNPL)
- Improve their credit score month by month
- Accept all different payment methods (SPEI, Cash, TDD/TDC)

We are backed by Techstars, Arkfund, DVC, First Check Ventures, Iluminar, Flight VC, and several business angels.

payload.companyDescription: As a global commercial real estate services leader with 52,000 professionals worldwide, we will never settle for the world that’s been built, but relentlessly drive it forward for our clients, colleagues and communities. #BetterNeverSettles

payload.summary:
Soy Roberto Ruello, un apasionado profesional del sector inmobiliario con una sólida trayectoria que abarca 28 años de experiencia en el mercado. Mi carrera se ha centrado en conectar a las personas con sus sueños de hogar y en ayudar a los inversores a maximizar el potencial de sus activos inmobiliarios.

A lo largo de mi carrera, he tenido la oportunidad de colaborar en proyectos significativos que no solo han transformado espacios físicos, sino que también han impactado positivamente en las comunidades. Estas experiencias me han enseñado la importancia de abordar cada proyecto con integridad y dedicación.

Como autor de "Sobre aviso no hay engaño", he compartido mis conocimientos y reflexiones sobre el sector inmobiliario, enfatizando la honestidad y la transparencia como pilares fundamentales en nuestras interacciones diarias. Este libro refleja mi compromiso de educar a los compradores y vendedores sobre el proceso inmobiliario, asegurando que estén bien informados y preparados para tomar decisiones adecuadas.

Mis objetivos profesionales están orientados hacia la continua perfección de mis habilidades y la ampliación de mis conocimientos en el ámbito inmobiliario. Estoy convencido de que el aprendizaje constante y la adaptación a las tendencias del mercado son claves para ofrecer un servicio excepcional. También busco establecer conexiones significativas con otros profesionales de la industria, ya que creo que el trabajo en red es fundamental para el éxito en nuestro campo.

Si estás interesado en el sector inmobiliario o buscas asesoramiento en bienes raíces, no dudes en contactarme. Juntos, podemos convertir tus metas en realidad.

For over 25 years, I've worked in Mexico and Latin America personally planning, launching and closing over 450 projects including land development, portfolio sales, facility leases and build to suit construction. I own and manage all 11 NAI Mexico offices, where are teams are active in industrial, hospitality and mixed use sectors.

In 2016, I spearheaded Panamericas Partners to provide consistent real estate advisory services for global clients in Mexico ---and added the Caribbean and Latin America. As the director for Panamericas Partners, I head teams delivering services in Puerto Rico, Jamaica, Bahamas, Costa Rica, Panama, Colombia, Peru, Chile, Brazil, and Argentina.

You can see me speak at several times each year at Latin America events throughout US, Canada, and Mexico. Find me at NAIOP, Cross Border Business Forum, the Mexico Logistics event, Mexico’s Aerospace Industry event, Mexico’s Auto Industry and Global Operations Directors Forums.

payload.companyDescription:
Desde 1929 hemos mirado hacia adelante, prediciendo cambios y siendo pioneros de ideas. Casi un siglo más tarde, el mismo sentido estratégico y pensamiento audaz siguen guiando nuestro enfoque. Hoy, nuestra plataforma integral brinda servicios interconectados y a la medida de cada tipo de cliente, desde propietarios a usuarios, desde inversores hasta fundadores, desde startups hasta compañías líderes. Aprovechando la inteligencia de la tecnología y de nuestros equipos, Newmark aporta ingenio a cada intercambio y transparencia a cada relación.
Pensamos más allá de edificios y líneas de servicio, brindamos una perspectiva global y un enfoque ágil. Re-imaginamos espacios y construimos soluciones, contamos con la visión para ver qué es lo que viene y tenemos la tenacidad para llegar ahí primero. Newmark (NASDAQ:NMRK) cotiza en bolsa y es una subsidiaria de Cantor Fitzgerald, uno de los nombres más antiguos y más establecidos de la industria de intermediarios financieros.

payload.headline: INTERMEX  - DIRECTOR GENERAL
payload.location: Ninguno [CERESO], Chihuahua, Mexico
payload.companyDescription:
Intermex is a Mexican private company with over 40 years of experience nationwide.  
More than 200 global companies have selected INTERMEX during that time.  

Our core business provides support to foreign and Mexican companies working to establish successful manufacturing operations in Mexico.  We do so through these main activities: shelter services, third-party logistic services and industrial real estate.  
Additionally, Intermex provides a city selection analysis designed to help the foreign company start operations in the most suitable city, according to specific needs and requirements.  This comparative analysis includes labor cost, logistics, services and real estate.

We feature these services:
•	Industrial Real Estate
                 Industrial parks with available existing and speculative buildings for immediate occupancy. World 
                 Class BTS structures.
•	Shelter
                 Administrative services to support foreign manufacturing operations in Mexico for a speedy, smooth, 
                 and successful transition.
•	Third-party logistics (3PL) 
                 Services for optimum consolidation and distribution of material and product management. Just in Time 
                 deliveries and Vendor Managed Inventories.
•	City selection
                 Consulting services and tools to make the most of Mexico’s strategic location.

payload.headline: Senior Vice President at Eagle Property Capital
payload.location: Monterrey, Nuevo León, Mexico
payload.companyDescription:
Eagle Property Capital (EPC) is a real estate investments firm engaged in the ownership, acquisition management and disposition of multifamily apartment properties, throughout the Southern United States, on behalf of institutional and private investors.  

EPC and its affiliates comprise an operating platform that provides real estate investment management services focused primarily in adding and creating value to Class B and C multifamily properties through reposition, renovation, release and recapitalization.  

EPC has the flexibility to provide a full range of services to its investors.  In addition to managing pooled and separate accounts, EPC offers customized real estate investment management services to institutional and qualified private investors seeking exposure to multifamily properties in EPC’s target markets.  

Since 2011, EPC has acquired 19 multifamily residential properties in Florida and Texas containing close to 4,400 apartment units.  EPC’s current portfolio contains ten properties, with close to 2,500 units.

payload.summary:
¿Necesitas optimizar tu operación logística, pero te frustra la falta de información confiable del mercado inmobiliario industrial?


¿Sueñas con reducir costos, expandirte a nuevos mercados, aumentar la satisfacción del cliente y en definitiva, impulsar la rentabilidad de tu negocio?

Estoy seguro que te encuentras enfrentando desafíos como:

➡️ Falta de información confiable sobre el mercado inmobiliario industrial y logístico para ganar cuentas importantes.
➡️ Dificultad para encontrar el espacio ideal para tu crecimiento.
➡️ Toma de decisiones a ciegas por falta de información precisa.
➡️ Pérdida de tiempo y recursos debido a una cadena de suministro ineficiente.
➡️ Retraso en la expansión por falta de planificación estratégica.
➡️ Aumento de los costos logísticos que impactan tu competitividad.

Si tu respuesta es afirmativa, entonces estás en el lugar correcto.

Soy un Especialista en Real Estate Logístico e Industrial, con una trayectoria de más de 9 años, guiando a empresas como la tuya hacia el éxito. He cerrado transacciones por más de $125 millones de dólares y colocado más de 20 millones de pies cuadrados de espacio industrial y logístico, logrando un incremento de rentabilidad en más de 19% para mis clientes en algunos casos.

¿Cómo lo hemos logrado?

Con la implementación de "The Logistics Success Model", una metodología propia que hemos desarrollado y que combina el profundo conocimiento del mercado inmobiliario industrial y logístico tanto mío como la de mi equipo de especialistas, a partir de un análisis profundo, información actualizada constantemente y un enfoque preciso en las necesidades específicas del negocio de nuestros clientes.

No permitas que la falta de información y conocimiento profundo del mercado inmobiliario Industrial y logístico te provoque retrasos y consecuencias graves en la eficiencia y rentabilidad de tu operación.

Envíame un mensaje DM o escríbeme a mi correo personal y agendemos una cita para hablar sobre cómo podemos ayudarte a alcanzar tus objetivos de rentabilidad y eficiencia, encontrando, seleccionando y negociando para ti el sitio con las mejores condiciones para el éxito de tu organización.

abraham.fernandez@nmrk.com
payload.headline: The Industrial Real Estate Influencer | Transactions for +125 MDD and +20 million feet | We increase your profitability +19% | My Methodology: The Logistics Success Model®
